title: Add file upload feature to LAN Hub

requirements.summary: Create Files page with drag-and-drop file upload interface and progress indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Renders a drag-and-drop zone for file selection
Provides a button for traditional file selection dialog
Shows upload progress with percentage indicator during upload
Displays success message with file name after successful upload
Shows error message if upload fails
Accepts multiple file types (documents, images, videos, etc.)

file_operations.description: Create Files page component with drag-and-drop zone using shadcn/ui Card component for upload area. Implement file input with onChange handler to capture selected files. Use ExternalBlob.fromBytes() to convert file data and attach upload progress tracking with withUploadProgress(). Call backend uploadFile method with blob, filename, size, and contentType. Display upload progress percentage during transfer. Show success toast with filename after completion or error message on failure. Include file list display section that will show uploaded files. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Display list of uploaded files with metadata and download functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Fetches and displays list of uploaded files from backend
Shows filename, formatted file size, and upload timestamp for each file
Provides download button for each file that triggers file download
Updates list automatically after new file upload
Shows empty state message when no files have been uploaded
Formats file sizes appropriately (KB, MB, GB)
Formats upload dates in human-readable format

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for file operations. Create useListFiles hook that calls backend.listFiles() to fetch file metadata array. Create useGetFile hook that accepts fileId parameter and calls backend.getFile(fileId) to retrieve file blob and metadata. Use ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() for download functionality. Ensure queries are invalidated after successful uploads to refresh the file list. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add file list section below upload area using useListFiles hook to fetch files. Map over files array to display each file in a Card component showing filename, formatted file size (convert bigint bytes to KB/MB/GB), and human-readable upload timestamp. Add Download button for each file that uses the file's ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() to trigger browser download via anchor element with download attribute. Show empty state message when files array is empty. Implement automatic list refresh by invalidating queries after successful upload. Format timestamps using date-fns or similar library for human-readable dates.

requirements.summary: Add Files navigation menu item linking to Files page
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu includes 'Files' menu item
Files link appears in logical order within existing menu items
Active state highlighting works for Files page
Link navigates to /files route

file_operations.description: Add Files menu item to navigation array between Dashboard and Network Status items. Include label 'Files' and href '/files'. Ensure active state highlighting applies when current route matches /files path using existing active state logic pattern from other menu items.

requirements.summary: Configure Files page route in application router
acceptanceCriteria: Files page route is defined at /files path
Route uses same Layout wrapper as other pages
Navigation to /files renders the Files page component

file_operations.description: Add route configuration for Files page at /files path within the existing router setup. Import Files page component and register route using same Layout wrapper pattern as Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings pages. Ensure route is defined in TanStack Router configuration with proper nesting under Layout component.
